case_title: DAVIS PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP VS. MOHAMED GHAFIL et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GHAFIL, MOHAMED AN INDIVIDUAL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIS PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GHAFIL, MOHAMED AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 504 4TH STREET, UNIT NUMBER 203, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107, INCLUDE ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES.
